creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
Created attachment 256367
ocaml-parmap.patch

Dear ocaml-parmap maintainer,

Please provide feedback on the attached patch.

The attached patch does:
Update to 1.2.5
Switch to USES=ocaml:dune.
Install stublib into package directory.
Strip shared libraries.

I'm going to include this patch into https://reviews.freebsd.org/D48228
so that all OCaml ports can get their revision bumped at once.
Therefore, it shouldn't be applied right away.

Thanks,
